message:
chore(beads): sync .beads/issues.jsonl with ATC + conformance work

Routine `br sync --flush-only` export reflecting the status
transitions that accumulated while landing the ATC v17 schema,
reservation event log, F1 help binding, conformance audit-doc
guard, and the Python-parity fixture regen pipeline. Keeps the
JSONL source of truth aligned with `.beads/beads.db` after the
multi-commit ATC/conformance push on this branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
